description: 14 production nodes deviate from approved NIST baseline configuration. Non-compliant settings include disabled logging and outdated cipher suites.

finding_title: Encryption at Rest Not Enforced on S3
description: Two S3 buckets storing sensitive data lack server-side encryption. AES-256 enforcement in progress via bucket policy update.

finding_title: Log Retention Gap — 30 Days vs 90 Required
description: Current log retention is 30 days. NIST and FedRAMP require 90 days minimum. SIEM policy update 80% complete.

finding_title: Password Complexity Not Enforced on 3 Systems
description: Three legacy systems do not enforce password complexity requirements. Group Policy update scoped and in testing.
